response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source infrastructure, but lacks explicit evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments, scaling engineering teams to 30+, or designing multi-agent frameworks for real-time credit/liquidity decisioning — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic tooling (MCP) and event-driven systems
Proven ability to build and ship complex distributed systems across languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in infrastructure projects
concerns: No clear evidence of leading AI systems in fintech or regulated financial environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No mention of real-time credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or compliance infrastructure in fintech
